description: baseline: cold-process TUI startup (Runtime.create + App.create), best-of-5

Benchmark fix: avoid asyncio.run() cleanup wait for background LSP-extension eager warmup thread (fire-and-forget, not on real critical path) — corrects ~120-150ms of measurement inflation, not a real app change

computer_use extension: lazy-construct the platform Desktop backend (deferred PyObjC/Quartz/AppKit import) instead of eagerly at register() — saves ~400ms/startup for a tool most sessions never use; pytest -q passes (2653 passed)
